'''yahomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khanjar|khanjar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-h-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khanjar|khanjar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yahomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæhemeth|yæhemeth]] || [[word:yæhemej|yæhemej]] || [[word:yæhemesh|yæhemesh]] || [[word:yæheme|yæheme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yahohomoth|yahohomoth]] || [[word:yahohomoj|yahohomoj]] || [[word:yahohomosh|yahohomosh]] || [[word:yahohomo|yahohomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yahomoth|yahomoth]] || [[word:yahomoj|yahomoj]] || [[word:yahomosh|yahomosh]] || [[word:yahomo|yahomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yahofmoth|yahofmoth]] || [[word:yahofmoj|yahofmoj]] || [[word:yahofmosh|yahofmosh]] || [[word:yahofmof|yahofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yahomotho|yahomotho]] || [[word:yahomojo|yahomojo]] || [[word:yahomosho|yahomosho]] || [[word:yahomoko|yahomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yahomoth|yahomoth]] || [[word:yahomoj|yahomoj]] || [[word:yahomosh|yahomosh]] || [[word:yahomo|yahomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yahomothol|yahomothol]] || [[word:yahomojol|yahomojol]] || [[word:yahomoshol|yahomoshol]] || [[word:yahomokol|yahomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yahomothotho|yahomothotho]] || [[word:yahomojojo|yahomojojo]] || [[word:yahomoshosho|yahomoshosho]] || [[word:yahomoko|yahomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yahomothon|yahomothon]] || [[word:yahomojon|yahomojon]] || [[word:yahomoshon|yahomoshon]] || [[word:yahomokon|yahomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yahomothoro|yahomothoro]] || [[word:yahomojoro|yahomojoro]] || [[word:yahomoshoro|yahomoshoro]] || [[word:yahomokoro|yahomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
